title: Terminal Context Menu Registered Paste Hardening Plan

implementation_source.sidecar_purpose: routing and task graph index; implementers must read Markdown TASK details for signatures, guides, rationale, pitfalls, tests, and DoD

validation_port_policy.notes: For target 0.5.3step1, the user's explicit instruction requires testing only against 2222. Do not run Playwright or manual validation against 2002 for this target. Ensure a BuilderGate HTTPS server is running on 2222 before executing these gates.

pre_commit_gate.cmd: cd frontend; $env:PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL='https://localhost:2222'; npx playwright test tests/e2e/terminal-context-menu-registered-items.spec.ts --project "Desktop Chrome"
cd frontend; $env:PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL='https://localhost:2222'; npx playwright test tests/e2e/terminal-context-menu-registered-items.spec.ts --project "Mobile Safari"
cd frontend; $env:PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL='https://localhost:2222'; npx playwright test tests/e2e/header-context-menu-regression.spec.ts --project "Desktop Chrome"

requirements.statement: Context menu multi-level navigation must work through actual desktop keyboard focus paths.
Root and child context menus must stay inside viewport across all edge positions.
Mobile context menu dialog must provide path/back/history and a coherent focus/ARIA contract.
Registered command, directory, and prompt values must paste exactly without execution.
Registered item menu snapshots must hide empty categories and avoid stale reuse after load failures.
Load and paste failures must remain observable and must not create input side effects.

tasks.title: Invalidate pending context-menu open and preserve registered snapshot correctness during slow preset load

acceptance_tests.cmd: cd frontend; $env:PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL='https://localhost:2222'; npx playwright test tests/e2e/terminal-context-menu-registered-items.spec.ts --project "Desktop Chrome"
cd frontend; $env:PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL='https://localhost:2222'; npx playwright test tests/e2e/header-context-menu-regression.spec.ts --project "Desktop Chrome"

rollback.command: 1) App.tsx와 MosaicContainer.tsx에서 close 시 sequence 증가와 slow-load branch 변경분을 제거한다. 2) terminal-context-menu-registered-items.spec.ts에서 slow-load 관련 신규 E2E만 제거한 뒤 기존 Desktop Chrome E2E를 다시 실행한다.

tasks.title: Add desktop initial focus and roving keyboard navigation

acceptance_tests.cmd: cd frontend; $env:PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL='https://localhost:2222'; npx playwright test tests/e2e/terminal-context-menu-registered-items.spec.ts --project "Desktop Chrome"

rollback.command: 1) ContextMenu.tsx에서 initial focus와 roving keyboard handler 변경분을 제거한다. 2) keyboard navigation E2E 신규 assertion만 제거하고 기존 click/hover submenu E2E를 실행한다.

tasks.title: Normalize mobile dialog focus, ARIA role, and close restore behavior

acceptance_tests.cmd: cd frontend; $env:PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL='https://localhost:2222'; npx playwright test tests/e2e/terminal-context-menu-registered-items.spec.ts --project "Mobile Safari"

rollback.command: 1) ContextMenu.tsx와 CSS에서 mobile focus trap과 ARIA role 변경을 제거한다. 2) mobile split E2E를 기존 단일 mobile flow test로 되돌리고 Mobile Safari E2E를 실행한다.

tasks.title: Strengthen paste E2E assertions with current input line equality

acceptance_tests.cmd: cd frontend; $env:PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL='https://localhost:2222'; npx playwright test tests/e2e/terminal-context-menu-registered-items.spec.ts --project "Desktop Chrome"
cd frontend; $env:PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL='https://localhost:2222'; npx playwright test tests/e2e/terminal-context-menu-registered-items.spec.ts --project "Mobile Safari"

rollback.command: 1) helpers.ts에서 expectVisibleTerminalCurrentInputEquals helper를 제거한다. 2) terminal-context-menu-registered-items.spec.ts의 exact input assertion을 기존 contains+debug metadata 조합으로 되돌린다.

tasks.title: Expand category, control-character, viewport, and mobile split coverage

acceptance_tests.cmd: cd frontend; $env:PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL='https://localhost:2222'; npx playwright test tests/e2e/terminal-context-menu-registered-items.spec.ts --project "Desktop Chrome"
cd frontend; $env:PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL='https://localhost:2222'; npx playwright test tests/e2e/terminal-context-menu-registered-items.spec.ts --project "Mobile Safari"

rollback.command: 1) 세 unit test 파일에서 matrix case 추가분만 제거한다. 2) E2E viewport/mobile split 신규 case를 제거하고 기존 terminal-context-menu-registered-items.spec.ts 전체를 다시 실행한다.
